name: RelationshipActualsOperationContracts
description: Typed transfer, refund, relationship, and exact channel-neutral actuals contracts including independent dimensions and reconciliation state.
schema_def: Transfer confirm, revoke, replace and refund confirm, revoke, replace use explicit transaction roles, reason, idempotency, active-role exclusivity, exact principal conservation, and cumulative refund checks. relationship.get returns stable detail and optional history. actuals.query first-page filters: accountIds, effective date range, categoryIds, poolIds including unassigned, instrumentIds including unknown, cardholderIds including unknown, evidenceKinds, reconciliationStates, transfer/refund/relationship/categorization/lifecycle states, groupBy none or pool or category or pool_category, pageSize 1..500. Later input is cursor only. Result: ordered items; exact totals netAccountMovement, externalSpend, budgetActual and currency; exact groups with unassigned and uncategorized buckets; cursor, expiry, snapshotId. Group sums equal all-up totals. Refunds follow original current pool and category unless explicitly corrected; transfers contribute zero external spend and budget actual. Stable errors cover invalid filters, cursor states, busy, and violated finance invariants.
